Everything is working correctly. Here is the summary:

**Root cause:** The frontend JavaScript in `/mnt/data/labs/webawesome/src/index.ts` used absolute fetch paths like `fetch('/api/tasks?limit=50')`. When the page is served at `labs.clung.us/webawesome/`, the browser resolves `/api/tasks` to `labs.clung.us/api/tasks`, which the labs-router interprets as a request for a lab named "api" -- returning 404.

**Fix applied:**
1. Added `<script>var BASE_PATH='${base}';</script>` to the `<head>` of al...(truncated)
